# discoverDescriptors(for:)

**Instance Method**

Discovers the descriptors of a characteristic.

## Declaration

```swift
func discoverDescriptors(for characteristic: CBCharacteristic)
```

## Parameters

- **characteristic**: The characteristic whose descriptors you want to discover.

## Discussion

When the peripheral discovers one or more descriptors of the specified characteristic, it calls the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheralDelegate/peripheral(_:didDiscoverDescriptorsFor:error:)] method of its delegate object. After the peripheral discovers the descriptors of the characteristic, you can access them through the characteristic’s [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristic/descriptors] property.

## Discovering Characteristics and Descriptors

- **discoverCharacteristics(_:for:)**: Discovers the specified characteristics of a service.
